violations.text: At the time of inspection, an allergen statement was not available for customer viewing at the point of purchase or on menus/menu boards. An allergen statement is to be supplied. (Allergen Awareness Statement was printed and put in place at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - The cookline metal hood/hood filters - The ice machine Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system pre-flush sprayer shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The floor in the kitchen area are in poor repair. Floor tiles and the sealed coating under the cookline were observed to be cracked/chipped exposing the subflooring below. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The kitchen floor is to be maintained as durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
